# Financial Health

> **Type:** Analytics
> **Provenance:** 3P
> **Contexts:** [finance, exhibitor, sponsorship]
> **Measures:** [contract-and-financial-management]
> **Catalog Sources:** decompositions/netsuite-erp.yaml (AR primitives), analytics/business-model/project-bid-based.yaml

## Purpose

Lightweight financial analytics for a GENERIC context at <$5M scale. Tracks the cash collection cycle that the offering memorandum highlights as a key strength: "50%+ cash collected within 4 months of show close." Also monitors revenue concentration risk — at 750 exhibitors, how much revenue depends on the top 10?

## Metrics

| Metric | Formula | Dimensions | Refresh |
|--------|---------|------------|---------|
| **ar_aging_30_60_90** | SUM(outstanding) WHERE days_overdue IN (30,60,90) buckets | edition, party_type | monthly |
| **cash_collection_velocity** | days from invoice to payment (median) | edition, party_type | per-edition |
| **pct_collected_within_4mo** | SUM(paid WHERE days <= 120) / SUM(invoiced) | edition | per-edition |
| **revenue_concentration_top10** | SUM(top_10_exhibitor_revenue) / SUM(total_exhibitor_revenue) | edition | per-edition |
| **forfeiture_rate** | COUNT(forfeited) / COUNT(contracted) | edition | per-edition |

## Data Pipeline

```
Bronze                          Silver                          Gold
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
QuickBooks export         ──▶   fct_transaction              ──▶  ar_aging_report
(invoices, payments)            (conformed to domain model)        cash_velocity_analysis
                                                                   concentration_analysis
```

## Cross-Context Data Requirements

| Data | Source Context | Source System |
|------|---------------|--------------|
| Invoices + payments | Finance | QuickBooks |
| Exhibitor revenue | Exhibitor | CRM / fct_exhibitor_edition |
| Sponsor revenue | Sponsorship | Sponsorship tracking |
| Forfeiture records | Finance | QuickBooks (credit memos) |

## Benchmarks

| Segment | Target | Signal |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Cash within 4 months | >= 50% | Confirmed from OM — maintain or improve |
| Median collection days | < 90 | Standard B2B billing cycle |
| Top-10 concentration | < 25% | Healthy diversification |
| Forfeiture rate | < 5% | Low cancellation |

## Capabilities

- ar-aging-analysis
- cash-collection-velocity-tracking
- revenue-concentration-analysis

## Feedback Loop

- **Measured in:** Finance
- **Consumed by:** Exhibitor (collections prioritization), Event (cash flow planning)
- **Drives:** Payment term decisions, deposit requirements, collections follow-up timing
- **Maturity path:** descriptive (sufficient at this scale)

## Related Patterns

- `contract-and-financial-management` — the domain pattern being measured
- `edition-performance-analytics` — edition P&L provides the revenue totals this pattern decomposes
